description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image ghcr.io/maxking/mailman-ci-runner:latest with two stages: quality-assurance and test. Add a qa job in the quality-assurance stage that runs the command tox -e lint. Add a coverage job in the test stage that runs tox -e py313-coverage. Add a test-sqlite job in the test stage that runs in parallel across a matrix of PYTHON_VER values (39, 310, 311, 312, 313, 313-head) executing tox -e "py$PYTHON_VER". No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are defined.
